ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "high" REAL /* Predicted high price based on comment sentiment */,
  "low" REAL /* Predicted low price based on comment sentiment */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of predicted price range */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of predicted price range */,
  "updated_comment" TEXT /* Last updated content of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the comment (e.g., forum, social media, news article) */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to make the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Computed sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of sentiment (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment category */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., NLP model, manual review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g., TSLA) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_stocks" (
  "comment_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment-stock association */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score associated with the comment-stock pair */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Sentiment category associated with the comment-stock pair (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_stocks_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "sentiment_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the sentiment trends */,
  "price_predictions" TEXT /* Price predictions derived from the sentiment analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Investment recommendations based on the sentiment analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
